name: Gated basket — 20% off LEGO + free shipping applied
description: SFCC OCAPI Shop basket document showing BOTH headline loyalty promos applied. The product line carries the 20%-off price_adjustment (product-level, from SFloyalty-20OFFLEGO); the shipping line carries the free-shipping price_adjustment (shipping-level, from SFloyalty-FreeShipping). Free shipping is a SHIPPING discount, so it never appears in a product_search hit's product_promotions — the cart/checkout badge renders from shipping_items[].price_adjustments here.

product_items.product_name: LEGO Star Wars Imperial TIE Fighter

notes: Shipping badge lives on shipping_items[].price_adjustments (promotion_id SFloyalty-FreeShipping, price -7.99 → shipping_total 0.00), NOT in product_promotions. Product line: base_price 39.99, price_adjustment -8.00 → price 31.99 (matches the PLP promotional_price). c_loyaltyBadges is an order-level convenience array the storefront can render as a stacked-badge row. Both promos come from the same session gating: their PMIDs activated because SFloyalty-20OFFLEGO and SFloyalty-FreeShipping are in session.custom.loyaltyPromotions.
